queries.question: What is the age group for an article written by a most senior author and the income level of the audience of that article?
queries.sql: SELECT Age_Group, Income_Level FROM Audience JOIN Articles ON Audience.Article = Articles.ArticleId JOIN Authors ON Articles.AuthorID = Authors.AuthorID Order by BirthDate ASC LIMIT 1
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?age_group ?income_level WHERE {
  ?audience a :Audience .
  ?articles a :Articles .
  ?audience p:hasArticles ?articles .
  ?authors a :Authors .
  ?articles p:hasAuthors ?authors .
  ?audience p:Age_Group ?age_group .
  ?audience p:Income_Level ?income_level .
  ?authors p:BirthDate ?birthdate_o .
}
ORDER BY ASC(?birthdate_o)
LIMIT 1

queries.question: What is the audience age group and income level for the latest article?
queries.sql: SELECT Age_Group, Income_Level FROM Audience JOIN Articles ON Audience.Article = Articles.ArticleId Order by PublicationDate DESC LIMIT 1
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?age_group ?income_level WHERE {
  ?audience a :Audience .
  ?articles a :Articles .
  ?audience p:hasArticles ?articles .
  ?audience p:Age_Group ?age_group .
  ?audience p:Income_Level ?income_level .
  ?articles p:PublicationDate ?publicationdate_o .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?publicationdate_o)
LIMIT 1
